title: Rocket Lab Announces Full Year and Fourth Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: Rocket Lab achieved record annual revenue of $436.2 million in 2024, representing 78% year-over-year growth, with record Q4 2024 revenue of $132.4 million. The company achieved a record number of 16 launches for Electron in 2024 (a 60% increase in launch cadence compared to 2023) and secured more than $450 million in newly-secured launch and space systems contracts. GAAP gross margin for the fourth quarter was 27.8%, at the high end of guidance, while non-GAAP gross margin was 34%, also at the high end of guidance. At the end of Q4 2024, Rocket Lab had $1.07 billion of total backlog, with launch backlog of $386 million and space systems backlog of $681 million. The company expects continued margin expansion in both segments as Electron's cadence continues to increase at higher average selling prices and the space systems business continues to scale.
